narrative:
Union Township V1V (precinct in Clermont County) has 612 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.5 percentage points.
